symbols.name: COMMENT_INVFLG
symbols.statement: INVFLG      EQU     $32             ; inverse flag zero-page address

symbols.name: COMMENT_PROMPT
symbols.statement: PROMPT      EQU     $33             ; prompt character zero-page address

symbols.name: COMMENT_YSAV
symbols.statement: YSAV        EQU     $34             ; Y-register backup in zero-page

symbols.name: COMMENT_YSAV1
symbols.statement: YSAV1       EQU     $35             ; additional Y-register backup in zero-page

symbols.name: COMMENT_CSWL
symbols.comment: pointing to a jump vector for character user output (configurable output pipeline)
symbols.statement: CSWL        EQU     $36             ; pointing to a jump vector for character user output (configurable output pipeline)

symbols.name: COMMENT_KSWL
symbols.comment: pointing to a jump vector for keyboard user input  (configurable input pipeline)
symbols.statement: KSWL        EQU     $38             ; pointing to a jump vector for keyboard user input  (configurable input pipeline)

symbols.name: COMMENT_PCL
symbols.statement: PCL         EQU     $3A             ; low-byte for printing addresses

symbols.name: COMMENT_PCH
symbols.statement: PCH         EQU     $3B             ; high-byte for printing addresses

symbols.name: COMMENT_ACC
symbols.statement: ACC         EQU     $45             ; note overlap with A5H!

symbols.name: COMMENT_XREG
symbols.statement: XREG        EQU     $46             ; X-register backup in zero-page

symbols.name: COMMENT_YREG
symbols.statement: YREG        EQU     $47             ; Y-register backup in zero-page

symbols.name: COMMENT_STATUS
symbols.statement: STATUS      EQU     $48             ; used by debug software

symbols.name: COMMENT_BRKV
symbols.statement: BRKV        EQU     $03f0           ; new vector for BRK

symbols.name: COMMENT_SOFTEV
symbols.statement: SOFTEV      EQU     $03f2           ; vector for warm start

symbols.name: COMMENT_PWREDUP
symbols.statement: PWREDUP     EQU     $03f4           ; this must = EOR #$A5 of SOFTEV+1

symbols.name: COMMENT_USRADR
symbols.statement: USRADR      EQU     $03f8           ; usr subroutine address at USRADR

symbols.name: COMMENT_KBD
symbols.statement: KBD         EQU     $c000           ; R last key pressed + 128

symbols.name: COMMENT_TAPEOUT
symbols.statement: TAPEOUT     EQU     $c020           ; RW toggle caseette tape output

symbols.name: COMMENT_MIXSET
symbols.statement: MIXSET      EQU     $c053           ; RW display split screen

symbols.name: COMMENT_LORES
symbols.statement: LORES       EQU     $c056           ; RW display lo-res graphics

symbols.name: COMMENT_PTRIG
symbols.statement: PTRIG       EQU     $c070           ; RW analog input reset

symbols.name: COMMENT_CLRROM
symbols.statement: CLRROM      EQU     $cfff           ; disable slot C8 ROM
